mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `user`
email, password, name, phone, nickname, profile_image, role, age, gender,
provider,
provider_id,
#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{role}, #{age}, #{gender},
#{provider},
#{providerId},
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, nickname, profile_image, role, age, gender, created_at, is_deleted, provider, provider_id FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, nickname = #{nickname}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `user` SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, nickname = #{nickname}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, nickname, profile_image, role, age, gender, created_at, is_deleted, provider, provider_id FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = false
